plugins.name: designlang
plugins.description: Five slash commands wrapping the designlang CLI: /extract (full design language → DTCG, Tailwind, Figma), /grade (shareable HTML report card + SVG badge), /battle (head-to-head graded comparison), /remix (restyle in 6 vocabularies — brutalist, swiss, art-deco, cyberpunk, soft-ui, editorial), /pack (one downloadable design-system bundle).
